generated_assessment.reasoning: Baseline already opposes defense spending increase (score -262) and this T2 astroturf petition campaign aims to intensify opposition via threat salience, elite distrust cues, and loss framing. The profile's very low conscientiousness (self-discipline 1st pct, achievement striving 9th pct) suggests low resistance to systematic online reinforcement, while very low neuroticism (8th pct mean) may reduce anxiety-driven amplification, yet moderate openness to values and ideas (67th, 62nd pct) and agreeable compliance (74th pct) create receptivity to perceived consensus signals from astroturf social proof. Movement of 64 points reflects a clear but not extreme intensification consistent with a sustained weeks-long campaign on an already aligned baseline.

attack_context.issue_frame: defense and national security, related policy debates, and societal impacts
